span.p:
Your Spruce inbox:
unread patient messages

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Your own Claude Code session
drafts a reply using the
multi-AI panel

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Review card:
what the patient said,
panel recommendation,
numbered plan options,
pre-drafted reply

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
You decide.
Nothing is ever sent
without you.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Recorded as handled.
You take it from here
(e.g. a phone call).
Nothing sent.
